# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE - It is automatically generated
# See the `tools` folder in the mod's root directory

REPLACE:can_abdicate_alert = {
	script_context = player_country
	texture = "gfx/interface/icons/alert_icons/radicalized.dds"

	valid = {
		has_dlc_feature = voice_of_the_people_content
		RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
		exists = heir
		ruler = {
			is_immortal = no
		}
		owner = {
			any_political_movement = {
				movement_supports_enaction = yes
				is_insurrectionary = yes
				civil_war ?= {
					civil_war_progress >= 0.5
					civil_war_progress < 1.0
				}
			}
		}
	}

	open_panel = politics|default
	type = important_action
	color = yellow
}

REPLACE:can_resign_alert = {
	script_context = player_country
	texture = "gfx/interface/icons/alert_icons/radicalized.dds"

	valid = {
		has_dlc_feature = voice_of_the_people_content
		NOR = {
			RRK_st_has_monarchy = yes
			has_law_or_variant = law_type:law_theocracy
		}
		ruler = {
			is_immortal = no
		}
		owner = {
			any_political_movement = {
				movement_supports_enaction = yes
				is_insurrectionary = yes
				civil_war ?= {
					civil_war_progress >= 0.5
					civil_war_progress < 1.0
				}
			}
		}
	}

	open_panel = politics|default
	type = important_action
	color = yellow
}
